source.name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
source.license_notes: Rules distilled from user-provided prompts for personal knowledge base use. Do not copy external media assets directly.

layout_rules: Use motion to reveal hierarchy, not to decorate every element.
Sequence hero elements: badge, heading, subheading, CTA, then stats/partners.
Use scroll reveal once for section entrances.
Let data/chart motion settle to readable static values.
Reduce parallax and heavy motion on mobile.
accessibility_notes: Do not animate every element at once.
Avoid fast bouncing, spinning, neon flashing, or motion that harms readability.
Do not rely on animation as the only way to communicate state or data.
Keep text readable during blur transitions.
implementation_hints: Default entrance: opacity 0, y 20, filter blur(10px) to opacity 1, y 0, filter blur(0px).
Use duration 0.6s to 1.2s and easeOut or power3.out.
Hero timing: badge 0.3-0.4s, heading 0.4-0.6s, subheading 0.8s, CTA 1.0-1.1s, stats 1.2-1.4s.
BlurText: split by words; each word enters from blur(10px), opacity 0, y 50; middle blur(5px), opacity 0.5, y -5; final blur(0), opacity 1, y 0.
Manual video loop: fade in 0.5s, fade out 0.5s before end, opacity 0 on ended, wait 100ms, reset currentTime, play, fade to 1.
Use whileInView, viewport once, opacity 0 to 1, y 30 to 0, duration 0.8s to 1s for scroll reveal.
avoid_when: looping chart animation after values settle

quality.notes: Distilled from multiple detailed React/Tailwind premium landing page prompts covering glassmorphism, video hero sections, typography, motion, SaaS, portfolio, and editorial layouts.

retrieval.ai_summary: Premium motion rules: use slow staggered blur/y/opacity entrances, BlurText word reveal, scroll reveal once, restrained hover scale, and manual fading video loops for hard-cut media. Avoid bouncing, flashing, or animating everything at once.
